description_long: This mosque complex features a sprawling, sand-colored structure with multiple interconnected buildings and courtyards, evoking traditional Middle Eastern architecture. The most prominent features are several large, rounded domes with a muted gray finish, distributed across the central and rear sections of the complex. The exterior walls are flat and rectilinear, with occasional arched doorways and small windows, and the overall layout is irregular, suggesting organic growth or adaptation to the surrounding environment. Palm trees and rocky outcrops are integrated into the site, enhancing the sense of place and authenticity. The mosque lacks visible minarets but includes several smaller domed structures and annexes, possibly for ablution or auxiliary functions. The surface finish is matte and rough, with no visible decorative patterns or calligraphy, emphasizing a utilitarian and historic aesthetic.
description: A large, sand-colored mosque complex with multiple gray domes, flat walls, and integrated palm trees and rocky outcrops, reflecting traditional Middle Eastern architecture. The structure is sprawling and irregular, with a matte, rough finish and no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: From this angle, the mosque's main domes and several annexes are visible, along with a prominent rocky outcrop and palm trees on the left side.
description_view_1: This view highlights the central domes and the dense arrangement of interconnected buildings, with palm trees and the rocky area more centrally located.
description_view_2: The rear of the mosque is visible here, showing the largest dome and a significant rocky outcrop, with the complex's irregular perimeter and multiple entry points.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the cluster of domes and the spread of the complex, with palm trees and the rocky section on the left, and more annexes visible on the right.
attribute_dome: Four large domes are visible, all rounded and gray, with two centrally placed and two toward the rear; no notable decorative features are apparent.
attribute_architectural_style: Traditional Middle Eastern, with sand-colored walls, multiple domes, and an irregular, organic layout.
